title: Chaos Mod - Beatable
description: A beatable Minecraft Chaos Mod datapack with 30+ unique effects, where a new random chaos event triggers every 30 seconds to keep gameplay fun, unpredictable, and fair.
body:
# Minecraft Chaos Mod - Beatable
Chaos Mod transforms Minecraft into a constantly changing challenge by triggering a new random chaos effect every 30 seconds. With over 30 unique effects, no two playthroughs are ever the same. You might be struck by lightning, have your hotbar shuffled, lose hunger, get launched into the air with low gravity, face a sudden mob ambush, or watch random blocks around you change unexpectedly.

### TO START - /trigger chaos_start
### TO STOP - /trigger chaos_stop

Despite the chaos, the mod is designed to remain fully beatable and balanced. Effects are meant to create fun and unpredictable moments without making survival impossible. Whether you're playing solo or with friends, Chaos Mod adds nonstop variety and excitement to every Minecraft world.

### Features
- A new random chaos effect triggers every 30 seconds.
- 30+ chaos effects are available, including Lightning, Hotbar Shuffle, Mob Ambush, Hunger Drain, and Random Blocks.
- Multiplayer support, with all players affected at the same time.
- Beatable and balanced gameplay designed to stay fun, unpredictable, and fair.

![Complete the Parkour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77233c0570edc38e86019a8e7a9453c12e8a886f.png)

### 📦 Installation
This is a Datapack - no mods required.

1. Download the .zip file
2. Open Minecraft and navigate to your world's folder
   - %appdata%\.minecraft\saves\<YourWorldName>\ on Windows
   - ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/saves/<YourWorldName>/ on macOS
3. Drop the .zip directly into the datapacks folder (do not unzip it)
4. Launch your world and run /reload if the world is already open
5. Watch for the Bebu load message in chat, you're live!

### ❓ FAQ
Q: Does this work with Fabric or Forge mods?

A: Yes. It's a vanilla datapack and runs alongside any mods without conflict.


Q: Can I use this on a server?

A: Absolutely. It's designed with multiplayer in mind.


Q: Does it work on existing worlds?

A: Yes. Simply add the datapack to an existing world and reload.
